docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT CALLOWAY, JEFFREY WAYNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN (VP). DEFENDANT JEFFREY WAYNE CALLOWAY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALLOWAY, JEFFREY WAYNE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,695.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$95.00) SERVED NOV-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALLOWAY, JEFFREY WAYNE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
